stemHtml:
Which of the following statements are correct about the effects of hypoxic hypoxia and anaemic hypoxia?

1. Hypoxic hypoxia can be caused by the decrease in the pressure of oxygen as you ascend.
2. Hypoxic hypoxia can be caused by the decrease in the percentage of oxygen as you ascend.
3. Anaemic hypoxia can be caused by smoking.
4. Anaemic hypoxia is caused by poor blood circulation.
5. Anaemic hypoxia is caused because the CO binds 200 times better with haemoglobin than O2.
6. Hypoxic hypoxia is caused by the inability of the heart to pump the blood around the body.
7. Hypoxic hypoxia is caused by low pressure.
